name: Minature Cheesecakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F (160°C).
2. In a bowl, mix together graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted margarine until well combined.
3. Press the crumb mixture into the bottom of six paper-lined muffin cups, filling each about three-quarters full.
4. Bake for 5 minutes in the preheated oven.
5. In another bowl, beat cream cheese with sugar, lemon juice, lemon peel, vanilla, and egg until smooth.
6. Pour the creamy mixture over the graham cracker crusts in each muffin cup.
7. Return the muffins to the oven and bake for an additional 25 minutes.
8. Allow the cheesecakes to cool before removing them from the pan.
9. Chill thoroughly before serving.
10. Top with fresh fruit or preserves just before serving.
Note: For best results, wrap chilled cheesecakes individually in plastic wrap and freeze until ready to serve. Let stand at room temperature for 40 minutes before garnishing and serving.
